summary: A roughly two-minute White House Small Business Week recap that intercuts Trump's remarks with a series of testimonials from small-business owners about his policies (tariffs, no tax on tips and overtime, 'golden age'). It includes b-roll and a host segment and consists largely of spoken testimonials and speech excerpts. No music track.
notable_text: Martin's Pretzel Bakery / Justus Martin, NEW YORK (U.S. Small Business Administration award); golden age of America
